message:
feat: Implement _testbuffer module for buffer protocol tests

- Add _testbuffer_mod.zig with PyBUF_* and ND_* constants
- Add testbuffer.zig runtime with ndarray and staticarray structs
- Register _testbuffer in import_registry and module_functions
- Handle wildcard imports (from _testbuffer import *) in from_imports.zig
- Add testbuffer.zig to runtime files list in compiler.zig

This enables test_buffer.py codegen (100 remaining errors down from 140+)
